pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.7 to 3.1.5 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and provides necessary compatibility for JDK 21 features and dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime environment or miss out on J21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jpastreamer dependency from 1.1.2 to 3.0.4 to support Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of jpastreamer likely depend on Spring Boot 2.x APIs or lack Java 21 compatibility, causing compile or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency from 1.18.24 to 1.18.30 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not fully support Java 21 language features or compiler internals, potentially causing annotation processing errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin from 3.10.1 to 3.11.0 to ensure Java 21 compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not correctly handle Java 21 source levels or module system changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SonarCloud configuration properties for code quality analysis.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Add explicit JPAStreamer bean definition to resolve Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration issues.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: Without this explicit bean, the application fails to start or function correctly due to missing or misconfigured JPAStreamer instance in the Spring context under Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Update imports to use jakarta.persistence instead of javax.persistence for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using javax.persistence causes compile errors or class loading failures.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Add necessary imports for the new JPAStreamer bean definition.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The new bean method uses JPAStreamer, ConditionalOnMissingBean (though not used in final code, likely part of initial attempt), and Bean annotations which require imports.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3.x); using it causes a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the deprecated javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile-time 'package does not exist' error if not updated to jakarta.persistence.
